However, based on available information, I can tell you that the plant you might be referring to is "Sophora sophoroides," also known as "Cnemidophila" or "Sophora". Sophora sophoroides is a plant species that belongs to the legume family (Fabaceae).

Sophora sophoroides is a plant species traditionally used in medicine. Sophora sophoroides is often used to make herbal teas and infusions, as well as dried extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions.
